title: Aesthetic Surfaces
description: The mod is about different decorative surfaces like carpets, ceilings, wallpapers, etc.
body:
Aesthetic Surfaces is a decorative Minecraft mod focused on expanding your building and interior design options with a variety of stylish surface blocks. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95b73448aa880f4ceb42aa3a6a58fac916d4dc15.png)

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)
[![Jam & Jelly link](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1133928/description_4a57ed46-7a8c-452d-b4dc-4e35ec16afae.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jam-jelly)
[![Aesthetic Seating link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e12aa9643912496a675d17b7a88b1692f01924e1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/aesthetic-seating)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris)
[![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)
[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e13c79f563423cc2402a14b79f9cbe456020321.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/aesthetic-surfaces)

Whether you're designing a cozy home, a grand palace, or a modern base, this mod adds the perfect finishing touches to make your builds feel complete and immersive.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32006c89a3e7edacca09438a555bd27ee05e84cb_0.webp)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2527a4ca0c57b2c32b9ca6d767971a17ff45c6ba.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09e7c57cba550d64c098d739040b190466cda5c8.jpeg)

Add flair and personality to your world with new carpets, wallpapers, ceilings, and other surface-themed blocks. Each surface type comes in a wide range of colors, patterns, and textures, allowing you to fully customize your interior spaces to match your creative vision.

From ornate wallpapers that breathe life into dull stone walls to elegant ceiling tiles and soft, patterned carpets for your floors, Aesthetic Surfaces gives you the tools to build spaces that are not only functional but also visually stunning.

Perfect for builders, interior decorators, and anyone who loves making their Minecraft world look beautiful!
